CustomField.description: Stores the sum of approved Billing Adjustment Credit Memos associated with this invoice, converted into the company reporting (Ledger) currency. Excludes credits with status Cancelled, Pending, Declined, or Submitted for Approval.
CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(leaseworks__Multicurrency_Enabled__c), leaseworks__Billing_Adj_Credit_Applied__c, IF( ISBLANK(leaseworks__Exchange_Rate__c), NULL, IF( leaseworks__Exchange_Rate__c = 0, 0, leaseworks__Billing_Adj_Credit_Applied__c* leaseworks__Exchange_Rate__c ) ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Displays the total approved Billing Adjustment Credits for this invoice, converted to the company’s reporting (Ledger) currency using the exchange rate from the original invoice.
CustomField.label: Billing Adj Credit Applied (Ledger)
